name: Srithai Superware Public Company Limited
summary: Srithai Superware Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes household plasticware and industrial products in Vietnam and internationally. It provides various food packaging products, including in mould labeling and food container products; beverage packaging products comprising PET bottles, closures, and preforms; rigid packaging products; automotive and motorcycle battery cases; material handling products, such as pallets, containers, and crates; garbage bins; plastic furniture products; and stadium, outdoor, auditorium, and unicorn seats, as well as lobby waiting chairs. The company also offers melamine tableware products; and mould for plastic injection. In addition, it operates a super outlet store. Srithai Superware Public Company Limited was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
